sections.paragraph: συνεργέω [συνεργός] ‘work along with in a supportive manner’, assist, help Mk 16:20; 1 Cor 16:16; 2 Cor 6:1; Js 2:22. πάντα συνεργεῖ εἰς ἀγαϑόν everything works out beneficially (σύν here functions intensively) Ro 8:28; if with some mss. God is taken as subject, then πάντα becomes object.
